headline: Assessing Prudential Financial (PRU) Valuation As Market Price Diverges From Narrative And DCF Estimates
summary: Prudential Financial at a glance Prudential Financial (PRU) has drawn fresh attention after recent trading left the stock with a market value of about US$36.16b and a last close near US$104, prompting investors to reassess its long term performance profile. See our latest analysis for Prudential Financial. Recent trading has lifted Prudential Financial's 1 month share price return to 10.52%, yet the stock remains down 8.56% on a year to date share price basis. The 1 year total shareholder...
